rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: BITSAdmin Downloading Malicious Binaries

rules.rule_text:
title: BITSAdmin Downloading Malicious Binaries
id: b195646e-8455-4fa1-b78a-91bb92371152
status: experimental
description: "It is not unusual for adversaries, including ones who peddle ransomware,\
  \ to use \nBITSAdmin to download arbitrary files from the internet in an effort\
  \ to evade \napplication blocklisting. The following analytic will look for the\
  \ execution of \nbitsadmin.exe with command options that suggest a file is being\
  \ downloaded. Part \nof the RedCanary 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/ingress-tool-transfer/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.command_and_control
- attack.t1105
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \bitsadmin.exe
    CommandLine|contains:
    - download
    - transfer
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
